BeliefDataStatus.description: Freshness, completeness, and degraded-signal state for one belief snapshot.

feature_completeness.description: Fraction of expected features available to the recognizer.
feature_completeness.title: Feature Completeness

ai_available.description: Whether AI services were available for optional review layers.
ai_available.title: Ai Available

degraded_modes.description: Explicit degraded modes active for this snapshot.
degraded_modes.title: Degraded Modes

freshness.description: Compact freshness label for UI display.
freshness.title: Freshness

completeness.description: Compact completeness label for UI display.
completeness.title: Completeness

BeliefDataStatus.title: BeliefDataStatus

DegradedMode.description:
Explicit degraded conditions that should not stop the engine.

Canonical values are prefixed to match Master Spec v2 and health/UI
badges. Legacy unprefixed inputs are still accepted for backward
compatibility with older persisted payloads and samples.
DegradedMode.title: DegradedMode

InstrumentRef.description: Stable instrument metadata for replay and backtests.

root_symbol.description: Root or continuous symbol when known.
root_symbol.title: Root Symbol

tick_size.description: Minimum price increment. A value of 0 means the collector could not resolve tick size and the payload is degraded.
tick_size.title: Tick Size

InstrumentRef.title: InstrumentRef

ReplayAiBriefing.description: Compact AI briefing packet derived from replay events and strategy-library matches.

objective.description: What the AI should decide or highlight for the operator.
examples: Identify the most defensible support and resistance zones from the last 5 sessions.
objective.title: Objective

focus_questions.description: Specific questions that the AI should answer.
focus_questions.title: Focus Questions

required_outputs.description: Expected output sections for the AI response.
required_outputs.title: Required Outputs

notes.description: Additional operator instructions preserved in the packet.
notes.title: Notes

ReplayAiBriefing.title: ReplayAiBriefing

ReplayCachePolicy.description: Replay cache policy controlling when ATAS should be queried and when snapshots become durable.

fetch_only_when_missing.description: Only fetch from ATAS when the replay packet is missing from local storage.
fetch_only_when_missing.title: Fetch Only When Missing

max_verifications_per_day.description: Maximum number of verification passes allowed per day.
max_verifications_per_day.title: Max Verifications Per Day

verification_passes_to_lock.description: How many successful verifications are required before the replay packet is locked as durable.
verification_passes_to_lock.title: Verification Passes To Lock

manual_reimport_required_after_invalidat.description: Whether replay acquisition must stay disabled until the operator explicitly re-enables it after invalidation.
manual_reimport_required_after_invalidat.title: Manual Reimport Required After Invalidation

ReplayCachePolicy.title: ReplayCachePolicy

ReplayChartBar.description: Chart bar reconstructed for the standalone replay workbench UI.

volume.description: Optional total volume for the bar.
volume.title: Volume

delta.description: Optional net delta for the bar.
delta.title: Delta

source_kind.description: Normalized candle source, for example history_bars, continuous_state, chart_candles, or synthetic_gap_fill.
source_kind.title: Source Kind

is_synthetic.description: Whether this candle is synthetic gap-fill rather than observed market data.
is_synthetic.title: Is Synthetic

bar_timestamp_utc.description: UTC-normalised bar timestamp preserved from ATAS metadata before timezone normalisation.
bar_timestamp_utc.title: Bar Timestamp Utc

original_bar_time_text.description: Raw bar time text string as it appeared in ATAS before any timezone interpretation.
original_bar_time_text.title: Original Bar Time Text

ReplayChartBar.title: ReplayChartBar

ReplayEventAnnotation.description: Structured event marker rendered as an overlay on the replay UI.

source_kind.description: Where this event came from, for example collector, strategy_library, manual_review, or ai_review.
source_kind.title: Source Kind

price_low.description: Lower bound when the event spans a zone.
price_low.title: Price Low

price_high.description: Upper bound when the event spans a zone.
price_high.title: Price High

linked_ids.description: Linked event, drive, zone, or strategy identifiers.
linked_ids.title: Linked Ids

notes.description: Short render-ready notes shown in the UI.
notes.title: Notes

ReplayEventAnnotation.title: ReplayEventAnnotation

ReplayFocusRegion.description: Price region highlighted for operator review and AI focus.

label.description: Short UI label for the region.
label.title: Label

ended_at.description: When this region stopped being relevant, if known.
ended_at.title: Ended At

price_low.description: Lower boundary of the highlighted region.
price_low.title: Price Low

price_high.description: Upper boundary of the highlighted region.
price_high.title: Price High

reason_codes.description: Compact reason tags behind the focus region.
reason_codes.title: Reason Codes

linked_event_ids.description: Events that justify this focus region.
linked_event_ids.title: Linked Event Ids

notes.description: Human-readable notes for the workbench sidebar.
notes.title: Notes

ReplayFocusRegion.title: ReplayFocusRegion

ReplayStrategyCandidate.description: Strategy-library item matched to the current replay window.

title.description: Short title displayed in the UI.
title.title: Title

matched_event_ids.description: Event ids that caused this candidate to be attached.
matched_event_ids.title: Matched Event Ids

why_relevant.description: Short statements explaining why the candidate is attached.
why_relevant.title: Why Relevant

ReplayStrategyCandidate.title: ReplayStrategyCandidate

ReplayVerificationState.description: Current verification state of the replay packet stored in the workbench cache.

status.description: Verification state of the cached replay packet.

verification_count.description: How many successful verification passes have been completed for this replay packet.
verification_count.title: Verification Count

last_verified_at.description: When the replay packet was last verified against ATAS or other trusted source.
last_verified_at.title: Last Verified At

next_verification_due_at.description: Next time a verification pass is allowed or required.
next_verification_due_at.title: Next Verification Due At

invalidated_at.description: When the replay packet was manually invalidated, if it was invalidated.
invalidated_at.title: Invalidated At

invalidation_reason.description: Optional operator note explaining why the replay packet was invalidated.
invalidation_reason.title: Invalidation Reason

locked_until_manual_reset.description: Whether this replay packet should remain durable until the operator manually invalidates it.
locked_until_manual_reset.title: Locked Until Manual Reset

ReplayVerificationState.title: ReplayVerificationState

ReplayWorkbenchAtasBackfillStatus.description: Lifecycle state of a server-side request asking the ATAS adapter to resend history.
ReplayWorkbenchAtasBackfillStatus.title: ReplayWorkbenchAtasBackfillStatus

ReplayWorkbenchGapSegment.description: One missing candle-time segment detected in a rebuilt replay packet.

prev_ended_at.description: End timestamp of the candle immediately before the gap when available.
prev_ended_at.title: Prev Ended At

next_started_at.description: Start timestamp of the first observed candle after the gap.
next_started_at.title: Next Started At

missing_bar_count.description: How many bars are missing between prev_ended_at and next_started_at.
missing_bar_count.title: Missing Bar Count

ReplayWorkbenchGapSegment.title: ReplayWorkbenchGapSegment

ReplayWorkbenchIntegrity.description: Unified replay data integrity state shared by build, snapshot, and live-tail APIs.

status.description: High-level integrity status such as complete, missing_local_history, or gaps_detected.
status.title: Status

window_days.description: Whole-day window size used for integrity evaluation.
window_days.title: Window Days

gap_count.description: How many missing candle segments were detected.
gap_count.title: Gap Count

missing_bar_count.description: Total missing bar count across all detected segments.
missing_bar_count.title: Missing Bar Count

completeness.description: Compact completeness label for UI and downstream consumers.
completeness.title: Completeness

freshness.description: Compact freshness label for UI and downstream consumers.
freshness.title: Freshness

latest_data_status.description: Compact data-status classification such as complete, degraded, or no_live_data.
latest_data_status.title: Latest Data Status

missing_segments.description: Missing candle segments normalized for backfill requests.
missing_segments.title: Missing Segments

latest_backfill_request_id.description: Most recent related backfill request id when available.
latest_backfill_request_id.title: Latest Backfill Request Id

latest_backfill_status.description: Status of the most recent related backfill request when available.

ReplayWorkbenchIntegrity.title: ReplayWorkbenchIntegrity

SourceRef.description: Producer metadata for tracing and support.

chart_instance_id.description: Chart or indicator-instance identifier used to separate multiple live ATAS charts.
chart_instance_id.title: Chart Instance Id

chart_display_timezone_mode.description: ATAS chart display timezone mode captured at payload emission.
chart_display_timezone_mode.title: Chart Display Timezone Mode

chart_display_timezone_name.description: ATAS chart display timezone name or abbreviation captured at payload emission.
chart_display_timezone_name.title: Chart Display Timezone Name

chart_display_utc_offset_minutes.description: ATAS chart display UTC offset in minutes captured at payload emission.
chart_display_utc_offset_minutes.title: Chart Display Utc Offset Minutes

instrument_timezone_value.description: Raw instrument timezone value from ATAS metadata captured at payload emission.
instrument_timezone_value.title: Instrument Timezone Value

instrument_timezone_source.description: Where the instrument timezone came from, captured at payload emission.
instrument_timezone_source.title: Instrument Timezone Source

collector_local_timezone_name.description: Collector machine local timezone name at payload emission.
collector_local_timezone_name.title: Collector Local Timezone Name

collector_local_utc_offset_minutes.description: Collector machine local UTC offset in minutes at payload emission.
collector_local_utc_offset_minutes.title: Collector Local Utc Offset Minutes

timestamp_basis.description: Primary basis used to normalize timestamps to UTC at payload emission.
timestamp_basis.title: Timestamp Basis

timezone_capture_confidence.description: Confidence level of the timezone capture at payload emission: high, medium, low, or unknown.
timezone_capture_confidence.title: Timezone Capture Confidence

SourceRef.title: SourceRef

description: Standalone replay-workbench packet used by the future UI and AI review loop.

profile_version.description: Instrument-profile version attached to this derived replay snapshot.
profile_version.title: Profile Version

engine_version.description: Recognizer engine version attached to this derived replay snapshot.
engine_version.title: Engine Version

data_status.description: Freshness, completeness, and degraded-mode summary for this replay snapshot.

cache_key.description: Stable cache key used to decide whether the replay packet should be reused or reacquired.
cache_key.title: Cache Key

acquisition_mode.description: Whether the packet came from local cache reuse or a fresh ATAS acquisition.

created_at.description: When the replay packet was generated.
created_at.title: Created At

display_timeframe.description: Primary bar timeframe used by the UI replay chart.

cache_policy.description: Cache policy controlling replay reacquisition and verification cadence.

verification_state.description: Current verification state for this replay packet.

integrity.description: Unified replay integrity state captured at snapshot build time.

candles.description: Reconstructed bar series used by the standalone replay UI.
candles.title: Candles

event_annotations.description: Structured event overlays rendered on the replay chart.
event_annotations.title: Event Annotations

focus_regions.description: High-priority regions highlighted for operator and AI review.
focus_regions.title: Focus Regions

strategy_candidates.description: Strategy-library candidates attached to this replay window.
strategy_candidates.title: Strategy Candidates

ai_briefing.description: Optional AI briefing assembled from events, focus regions, and strategy-library matches.

raw_features.description: Additional replay metadata such as history depth or ATAS workspace info.
raw_features.title: Raw Features

title: ReplayWorkbenchSnapshotPayload
